name: RWBY RPG (Big Update of First Message part 2)
description:
Today, our little Ruby ask my help to update first message like bleach anime did it. Uh, well... btw, let me tell you about the detail of new first message.

Be civilian is here.

Be civilian but talented is done.

Be student from Beacon Academy is here.

Be student in Shade Academy is here.

Be student in Haven Academy is here.

Be student in Atlas Academy is here as well.

But wait! Don't you think this is over. The more first message like be monster, be with white witch and much more than your hope. Soooo.... Next update will never disappoint you so long for make my little Ruby Rose alive longer.
creator: Roland1234
